response:
# Cheaper Alternatives to n8n

## **Free/Open-Source Options**

| Tool | Cost | Best For |
|------|------|----------|
| **Zapier Free** | Free (basic) | Simple workflows, popular apps |
| **IFTTT** | Free (basic) | Simple if-this-then-that automation |
| **Make (Integromat)** | Free tier available | Visual automation, good UI |
| **Node-RED** | Free, self-hosted | Technical users, IoT workflows |
| **Apache Airflow** | Free, self-hosted | Complex data pipelines |
| **Huginn** | Free, self-hosted | Lightweight automation agent |

## **Budget-Friendly Paid Options**

| Tool | Starting Price | Notes |
|------|-----------------|-------|
| **Make** | ~$10/mo | More affordable than n8n |
| **Zapier** | $20/mo | Industry standard, limited free tier |
| **Integromat** | $9.99/mo | Budget-friendly automation |
| **Parabola** | Custom pricing | More visual, enterprise-focused |
| **Botsify** | Free-$99/mo | Simple workflow builder |

## **Self-Hosted/Open-Source (Best Value)**

- **n8n Self-Hosted** (Free) - Deploy n8n yourself to avoid licensing costs
- **Mattermost Workflows** - Built-in automation, free
- **Automatisch** - n8n alternative, open-source
- **Activepieces** - Modern, lightweight, free tier

## **Best Budget Strategy**

1. **Start free** → IFTTT or Make free tier
2. **Need more power** → Self-host n8n or use Automatisch
3. **Team scaling** → Move to paid when necessary

**What's your use case?** I can recommend the best fit.
